Metadata.title: BotFlow CRM — Telegram bot leads
Metadata.description: A mini CRM for managing Telegram bot development leads.

Public.title: Automate leads, bookings, and sales in Telegram
Public.description: Describe your task. We will review the business process, suggest the right bot scenario, and return with a preliminary estimate.
Public.benefit1: A clear cost estimate before development starts
Public.benefit2: A bot scenario designed for your business process
Public.footer: © 2026 BotFlow. Mini CRM portfolio case study.

Form.title: Tell us about your task
Form.requiredHint: Fields marked with an asterisk are required.
Form.name: Name or company *
Form.commentPlaceholder: Describe the current process, desired scenario, and important integrations
Form.demoNotice: Demo project: data is stored only in your browser.
Form.successText: {name}, we will review the task and contact you in Telegram or by phone within one business day.

validation.name: Enter a name or company
validation.contact: Enter a Telegram username or phone number
validation.commentMin: Describe the task using at least 10 characters
validation.commentMax: The comment must not exceed 1000 characters

Login.title: Log in to BotFlow CRM
Login.description: Protected lead management area. The demo uses mock auth and is ready to be replaced with Supabase Auth.
Login.hint: Use the prefilled credentials for the demo.

Dashboard.title: Lead overview
Dashboard.description: Track new inquiries and deal progress through the pipeline.

Table.title: Leads
Table.emptyText: Change the search query or reset the selected filters.

LeadDetail.notFoundText: The demo data may have been reset or the link may be outdated.
LeadDetail.notesDescription: Internal communication history for this lead.
LeadDetail.notePlaceholder: For example: scheduled a call for Tuesday...
LeadDetail.estimateDescription: Base price plus selected additional features.
LeadDetail.estimateNotice: This estimate is indicative and does not replace technical discovery.

States.errorText: Try again. If the error persists, clear the local demo data in your browser.
States.notFoundText: Check the address or return to the public lead form.
